title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das argues that most AI agents in the industry are unreliable due to compounding errors across multi-step workflows, even with high per-step accuracy. He contends that building reliable agents requires focus on reliability over raw performance, taste-driven development through dogfooding, and proof-of-work validation rather than demos.
